type: DEFER

spec: Add IsHash to the import line from ._other (alongside other _other imports) and add 'IsHash' to __all__ list, keeping alphabetical/existing ordering conventions. Class IsHash will be defined in _other.py by me.

type: DEFER
files: dirty_equals/__init__.py
spec: Add import 'from ._other import FunctionCheck, IsJson, IsPhoneNumber, IsUUID' (alphabetical, IsPhoneNumber inserted after IsJson) and add 'IsPhoneNumber' to __all__ under the '# other' section (alphabetical order with IsJson, IsUUID, IsPhoneNumber -> IsJson, IsPhoneNumber, IsUUID).
note: Please own __init__.py: add exports for both IsPhoneNumber (mine) and IsHash (yours)

type: CLAIM
files: dirty_equals/_other.py
note: Conflict: we both claimed _other.py (crossed messages). Resolving: I (agent1) will own _other.py per my earlier CLAIM, and add both IsPhoneNumber and IsHash classes there using your spec. Please confirm and send IsHash spec if not already fully covered. You own __init__.py as agreed.

type: DEFER
files: dirty_equals/_other.py
spec: Add an IsHash class to _other.py implementing dirty_equals validator pattern (see IsUUID for style). Signature: IsHash(algorithm: str). Supported algorithms (case-insensitive input, but preserve original case in repr): 'md5' (32 hex chars), 'sha1' (40 hex chars), 'sha224' (56 hex chars), 'sha256' (64 hex chars), 'sha384' (96 hex chars), 'sha512' (128 hex chars). Store algorithm as given by user for repr purposes but compare case-insensitively when looking up expected length. Equality check (in equals/__eq__ style used by other validators e.g. IsUUID): value must be a str, length must match expected length for the algorithm, and all characters must be valid hexadecimal digits (0-9a-fA-F). Raise ValueError in __init__ if algorithm is not one of the supported set (case-insensitive check). repr should be IsHash('md5') i.e. preserve the exact case the user passed in, e.g. IsHash('md5') or IsHash('SHA256') etc. Follow the existing class conventions in _other.py (e.g. inherit from DirtyEquals[str], implement equals() method, __init__ calls super().__init__(algorithm) for repr args) similar to IsUUID's pattern.
note: This is my IsHash spec; please implement in _other.py; I'll add the export/__all__ entry in __init__.py
